basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Assistant and Field Investigator Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. preferred for Research Assistant. Experience in field surveys, data collection, interviews, and computer applications preferred for Field Investigator.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. preferred. Knowledge of research methodology and computer applications. Research experience will be preferred. Field Investigator: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. Experience in field surveys, data collection, interviews, and computer applications will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) for Research Assistant, ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated) for Field Investigator
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) Field Investigator: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.delhi_university: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) for Research Assistant, ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated) for Field Investigator

Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. preferred for Research Assistant. Experience in field surveys, data collection, interviews, and computer applications preferred for Field Investigator.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Delhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. preferred. Knowledge of research methodology and computer applications. Research experience will be preferred. Field Investigator: Postgraduate in any Social Science discipline with at least 55% marks. Experience in field surveys, data collection, interviews, and computer applications will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: ₹37,000/- per month (Consolidated) Field Investigator: ₹20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Delhi University Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Research Assistant position, candidates must have completed their postgraduate studies in any Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. qualifications are preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The Field Investigator post offers a consolidated salary of ₹20,000/- per month. This is a temporary position, and the salary is paid on a monthly basis.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for these positions at Delhi University?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your detailed CV, self-attested copies of educational certificates, and other relevant documents to the provided email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by Delhi University for this recruitment drive. One vacancy is for the post of Research Assistant and the other is for Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, experience in field surveys, data collection, conducting interviews, and proficiency in computer applications will be preferred for the Field Investigator position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates are required to send their applications and supporting documents to a specific email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both Research Assistant and Field Investigator posts will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should be attached with the application email?
faq.answer: You should attach your detailed CV, self-attested copies of educational certificates and mark sheets, NET/M.Phil./Ph.D. certificates (if applicable), experience certificates, and any other relevant supporting documents.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the appointment for these posts?
faq.answer: The appointment for the Research Assistant post is for a duration of 12 months, and for the Field Investigator post, it is for 9 months. These are temporary positions.
